description: Shared reusable-workflows repo. Renovate keeps the third-party action SHA pins current; chore(deps) keeps bumps out of the release-please CHANGELOG. All bumps automerge once the self-CI (actionlint + zizmor) gate is green, so the reusables stay patched hands-off.

packageRules.description: Pin all GitHub Action refs to an immutable SHA (with a # vX.Y.Z comment), matching the zizmor hash-pin policy these reusables enforce.

customManagers.description: Track the GoReleaser CLI version pinned as the binaries.yml goreleaser-version input default.
